title: X Evangelion character is adjective
wikitext:
[]: [X Evangelion character] is [adjective]!!             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue Mar 01, 2011 11:13 pm As of late, people on the forum have taken the Chit-Chat section's description quite literally, and so, I want to see if a combination of NGE characters and adjectives can be formed in such a way for EVERY NGE character (ex., Misato is well-endowed!). ENGAGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Tue Mar 01, 2011 11:16 pm Gendo is moist.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Mar 01, 2011 11:43 pm Fuyutsuki is old. Ritsuko is smoky. Maya is clear. Aoba is chill. Hyuuga is gaseous. Kensuke is shiny. Toji is blunt. Yui is dark. Kyoko is split. Ummm...That's all I got.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Mar 02, 2011 12:06 am Gendo is chunky Shinji is clingy Asuka is prudish Rei is fucked & Mari is a beast Oh, and Misato is one hell of a commander when she's smashed!

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Mar 02, 2011 12:41 am Maya is flatulent.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Mar 02, 2011 12:50 am Rei is cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 02, 2011 12:56 am Shinji is melancholic. Asuka is choleric. Misato is sanguine. Yui is phlegmatic. (I probably did that wrong. I just think they're nifty-sounding adjectives.)

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Mar 02, 2011 1:03 am Reichu wrote: (I probably did that wrong. I just think they're nifty-sounding adjectives.)

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Mar 02, 2011 5:00 am Rei is fragmented. YEAHHHHHHH.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Mar 02, 2011 11:35 am Asuka is hot!

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Wed Mar 02, 2011 1:38 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Asuka is hot!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Mar 02, 2011 1:43 pm Jessemon wrote: she can speak another language

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Mar 02, 2011 1:54 pm Kaworu is flexible.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Wed Mar 02, 2011 1:57 pm Gendo is charismatic. Ritsuko is sardonic. Rei is frigid. Asuka is annoying. Shinji is annoying. Misato is promiscuous. Keel is intelligent. Fuyutsuki is underrated.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Mar 02, 2011 2:01 pm Allemann wrote: Asuka is annoying.

[]:             Quote Post by violaine » Wed Mar 02, 2011 6:10 pm shigeru is best

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Mar 02, 2011 6:11 pm Kaji is senecan. Misato is brachiate. Rei is futurist. Eva-00 is tarot. Ramiel is pruned. Shinji is accompanying. Gendo is scrap. Ritsuko is short. Shamshel is complementary. Toji is oblivious. Kensuke is bibliographical. Ramiel is untasted. Eva-01 is placable. Arael is unsoluble.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Wed Mar 02, 2011 10:19 pm Rei is moe.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Mar 02, 2011 11:38 pm Merridian wrote: Maya is flatulent.

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Thu Mar 03, 2011 12:23 am Asuka is good Misato is better Rei is best
